name: product_quality
description: build quality, materials, craftsmanship, defects, whether the item feels well made

name: usability
description: ease of use, setup, instructions, learning curve, convenience, user experience

name: performance
description: how well the product works, effectiveness, speed, power, accuracy, main function

name: reliability_durability
description: long term reliability, durability, lasting, failures, wear, consistency over time

name: value_for_money
description: price, value, worth, affordability, whether the product justifies its cost

name: shipping_packaging
description: delivery, shipping speed, packaging, condition on arrival, missing parts

name: customer_service_warranty
description: seller support, returns, warranty, refunds, replacement, customer service

name: design_appearance
description: look, style, color, finish, size impression, design aesthetics

name: features_functionality
description: features, included functions, compatibility, accessories, options, controls

name: fit_size
description: fit, sizing, dimensions, weight, comfort when relevant to the product
